title: Brief
description: The spec-ready brief produced by /arc-shape and consumed by /cw-spec. Mirrors the format defined in references/brief-format.md: problem, proposed solution, success criteria (>=3), constraints, assumptions, wave assignment, and open questions. Every string field enforces a non-trivial minimum length so validators can catch placeholder-only briefs.

title.description: Idea title, matching the BACKLOG entry.

problem.description: 1-3 sentences identifying who is affected, the pain point, and the impact.

proposed_solution.description: 1-2 sentences describing the capability the solution unlocks (not the implementation).

success_criteria.description: At least three independently-verifiable outcomes (measurable or binary).

constraints.description: Bounding limitations (time, technical, team, scope, compliance). Use a single 'No constraints identified' entry if none apply.

assumptions.description: Statements that must hold for the solution to work. Use a single 'No assumptions identified' entry if none apply.

wave_assignment.description: ROADMAP wave reference (e.g. 'Wave 1: Plugin Foundation') or the literal string 'Unassigned'.

oneOf.description: Literal 'None' when shaping resolved all questions.

open_questions.description: Either an array of question strings or the literal string 'None'.
